REQUEST TO COURT CLERK TO ORDER DELIVERY OF FILE IN SUPPORT OF MOTION OF DEFENDANT HYOUNG K EE AND DEFENDANT ROBERT I. SIMON FOR ORDER DISMISSING THE COMPLAINT HEREIN PURSUANT CCP 581(F)(1) AND CCP 581(F)(2)(SF LOCAL RULE 8.6.A) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, HYOUNG OK SIMON, ROBERT I

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HYOUNG LEE AND ROBERT SIMON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND THE DECLARATORY RELIEF ACTION. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO A CAUSE FOR DAMAGES, BUT NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CIVIL CONSPIRACY WHICH WOULD FIRST REQUIRE AN ORDER PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1714.10. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT HYOUNG LEE, AND, ROBERT SIMON'S MOTION FOR ORDER DISMISSING THE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR, AS MOOT, PER APRIL 1, 2009 DISMISSAL. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR 3321

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HYOUNG LEE, AND, ROBERT SIMON'S RE-NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ORDER DISMISSING THE COMPLAINT HEREIN PER CCP 581(F)(1) AND CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 581(F)(2). NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED WITH PREJUDICE, NO OPPOSITION FILED. IN ADDITION, THE COURT VACATES THE PRIOR DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PURSUANT TO WELLS VS. MARINA CITY PROPERTIES, INC. (1981) 29 CAL.3D 781. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Off Calendar

Re Notice Of Motion For Order Dismissing The Complaint Herein Per Ccp 581(F)(1) And Code Of Civil Prodecure 581(F)(2)
Off Calendar May-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HYOUNG LEE, and, ROBERT SIMON'S Re-Notice of Motion For Order Dismissing the Complaint herein Per CCP 581(F)(1) and Code of Civil Procedure 581(F)(2). No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted with prejudice, no opposition filed. In addition, the Court vacates the prior dismissal filed by Plaintiff pursuant to Wells vs. Marina City Properties, Inc. (1981) 29 Cal.3d 781. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Dismissing The Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, as moot, per April 1, 2009 dismissal. (302CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: JoAnn Bryce, CSR 3321
